mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(create_time) = #{year} AND month(create_time) = #{month}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(create_time) = #{year} AND month(create_time) = #{month} AND track_state <> 1
SELECT id,accid,source FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(create_time) = #{year} AND month(create_time) = #{month}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(create_time) = #{year} AND month(create_time) = #{month} AND check_time is not null
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(creat_time) = #{year} AND month(creat_time) = #{month}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(fixloss),0) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(creat_time) = #{year} AND month(creat_time) = #{month}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(settle_accounts),0) FROM app_indent WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(creat_time) = #{year} AND month(creat_time) = #{month}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_push_bill WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(create_time) = #{year} AND month(create_time) = #{month} AND message_car_id is not null
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(momey),0) FROM app_user_account_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND year(create_time) = #{year} AND month(create_time) = #{month} AND type = 4
